Module io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.prometheus.core
Package io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.prometheus.data

Interface PrometheusData.PrometheusDataListCtl<T extends PrometheusData.PrometheusDataItemCtl>

Type Parameters:
T - the dataType
All Superinterfaces:
MetisDataItem.MetisDataList<T>, MetisDataItem.MetisDataObjectFormat, PrometheusTableItem.PrometheusTableList<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
PrometheusControlData.PrometheusControlDataList, PrometheusControlKey.PrometheusControlKeyList, PrometheusControlKeySet.PrometheusControlKeySetList, PrometheusDataInfoItem.PrometheusDataInfoList, PrometheusDataKeySet.PrometheusDataKeySetList, PrometheusDataList, PrometheusEncryptedDataItem.PrometheusEncryptedList, PrometheusStaticDataItem.PrometheusStaticList
Enclosing interface:
PrometheusData
public static interface PrometheusData.PrometheusDataListCtl<T extends PrometheusData.PrometheusDataItemCtl> extends PrometheusTableItem.PrometheusTableList<T>
DataList interface.

    • setEditState

      void setEditState(MetisDataEditState pState)
      Set the EditState for the list (forcible on error/change).
      Parameters:
      pState - the new MetisDataEditState (only ERROR/DIRTY)

      the matching item

    • findItemById

      T findItemById(Integer pId)
      Obtain item by id.

      Returns:
      the item (or null if not present)
